warps.notes: Left door tile on north side — exits to Route 34 warp 1 (x=13,y=37)
Right door tile on north side — exits to Route 34 warp 2 (x=14,y=37)
Left door tile on south side — exits to Ilex Forest warp 1
Right door tile on south side — also exits to Ilex Forest warp 1

tile_layout.notes: 20 columns x 8 rows. Gate building connecting Route 34 (north exits x=4-5,y=0) to Ilex Forest (south exits x=4-5,y=7). Teacher NPC behind counter on east side (x=9,y=3). Butterfree sprite on east side (x=9,y=4). Lass NPC walks up/down on west side (x=3,y=4). Teacher2 (Forest Is Restless variant) at x=5,y=7 only appears during EVENT_FOREST_IS_RESTLESS (blocks south exit). Coord event at x=4,y=7 triggers the Celebi event scene.

npcs.name: Teacher (Normal State)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Gives TM12 Sweet Scent on first interaction (sets EVENT_GOT_TM12_SWEET_SCENT). Explains Sweet Scent lures wild Pokemon. After giving: 'Use it wherever Pokemon appear. Pokemon will be enticed by it.' Disappears and is replaced by Teacher2 when EVENT_FOREST_IS_RESTLESS is active.

npcs.name: Teacher (Forest Is Restless State)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Only appears when EVENT_FOREST_IS_RESTLESS is set (Celebi event). Stands in the south doorway to block passage. Says 'Something's wrong in ILEX FOREST… You should stay away right now.' Triggers a scripted scene: chases player back, blocks them from entering forest.
npcs.notes: Part of the Crystal-exclusive Celebi GS Ball event. Teacher2 appears in the walkway tile (x=5,y=7) blocking the south exit while Teacher1 is hidden.

npcs.name: Butterfree
npcs.dialogue_summary: BUTTERFREE: Freeh! (Decorative Pokemon, plays Butterfree cry on interact.)

npcs.name: Lass
npcs.dialogue_summary: Describes the shrine in the forest honoring the protector. 'It watches over the FOREST from across time. I think that it must be a grass-type Pokemon.' (Alludes to Celebi.)

items.name: TM12 (Sweet Scent)
items.notes: Given by Teacher NPC on first interaction. verbosegiveitem TM_SWEET_SCENT. Only given once (flag prevents re-giving).

map_callbacks.notes: Checks EVENT_FOREST_IS_RESTLESS flag. If true: hides Teacher1 (behind counter), shows Teacher2 (in walkway/south door). If false: shows Teacher1, hides Teacher2. This manages the Celebi event gate blockage.

coord_events.notes: Triggered when player steps on the south exit tile during EVENT_FOREST_IS_RESTLESS. Teacher2 chases and stops the player, delivers warning dialogue, then returns to position. Player is blocked from entering the forest.

story_events.description: Player walks south through the gate from Route 34 into Ilex Forest. Teacher gives TM12 Sweet Scent to help encounter wild Pokemon for the Pokedex.

Crystal only: GS Ball placed at Ilex Forest shrine activates EVENT_FOREST_IS_RESTLESS. Teacher2 now blocks the south exit and intercepts the player with a warning. Coord event at the exit tile triggers the chase scene. Player cannot enter Ilex Forest until Celebi battle is triggered from within.

notes: The Route 34 / Ilex Forest Gate is a 10x4 block (20x8 tile) gate building sitting between the southern end of Route 34 and the northern entrance to Ilex Forest. It connects ROUTE_34 (north, warps 1-2) to ILEX_FOREST (south, warp 1). The Teacher behind the east counter gives TM12 Sweet Scent on the player's first interaction. A Butterfree sprite decorates the east side (cries on interact). A Lass walks up and down on the west side and alludes to Celebi. The gate has a special Celebi event state (Crystal only): when EVENT_FOREST_IS_RESTLESS is active, Teacher2 blocks the south doorway and a coord event triggers a blocking scene, preventing entry into the forest. The MAPCALLBACK_OBJECTS callback manages which Teacher variant is visible.
